name: Period functions and cotangent sums
title: Period functions and cotangent sums
abstract: Introduces cotangent sums with reciprocity formulae and studies a period function related to divisor sums and zeta second moments.
rolesInH15: background for cotangent-sum and period-function structures
findings: Already present locally. Verified as a Bettin–Conrey paper on period functions and cotangent sums; it is not the Bettin–Conrey–Farmer BCF-asymptotic source described in the earlier manifest.
